title: Resolving VPN authentication timeouts
summary: Clear the cached credentials, reset the VPN client, and confirm the user is in the VPN security group.

title: Wi-Fi keeps dropping on corporate laptops
summary: Update the wireless driver and forget/re-add the corporate SSID; check for 5GHz band steering issues.

title: VPN connects but throughput is very slow
summary: Switch the user to the nearest VPN gateway and disable split-tunnel exclusions causing rehairpinning.

title: DNS resolution failures for internal hosts
summary: Flush the DNS cache, verify the internal resolver order, and confirm the search-domain suffix is applied.

title: Account locked after too many sign-in attempts
summary: Verify identity, unlock the account in the directory, and force a password reset at next login.

title: Setting up multi-factor authentication (MFA)
summary: Re-enroll the authenticator app, remove the stale device, and issue temporary bypass codes if needed.

title: Cannot access the shared network drive
summary: Confirm group membership for the file share and remap the network drive with the correct credentials.

title: Single sign-on (SSO) login loops or fails
summary: Clear the SSO session cookies, verify the SAML clock skew, and re-establish the trust assertion.

title: Self-service password reset not working
summary: Confirm the user's recovery methods are registered and unblock the password-reset registration policy.

title: Outlook not sending or receiving email
summary: Rebuild the Outlook profile, check the mailbox quota, and verify the Exchange connection status.

title: Mailbox is full and rejecting new mail
summary: Enable online archive, raise the temporary quota, and run a mailbox cleanup of large attachments.

title: Teams meeting audio or video not working
summary: Reset the Teams device settings, clear the client cache, and confirm OS microphone/camera permissions.

title: Laptop will not power on or boot
summary: Perform a power drain, test with a known-good charger, and run hardware diagnostics; arrange a swap if it fails.

title: Office printer shows offline
summary: Restart the print spooler, power-cycle the printer, and reinstall the network printer port.

title: External monitor shows no signal
summary: Reseat the video cable, force display detection, and update the dock firmware/graphics driver.

title: Docking station not detecting peripherals
summary: Update the docking station firmware, reseat the USB-C connection, and re-enable the device in Device Manager.

title: Requesting installation of approved software
summary: Confirm the software is on the approved list, check license availability, and push it via the deployment tool.

title: Software license activation fails
summary: Re-assign the license seat, clear the local license cache, and re-run activation against the license server.

title: Application crashes immediately on launch
summary: Clear the app cache, repair the installation, and check for a conflicting plugin or corrupt user profile.

title: Application cannot connect to the database
summary: Check the database server status, validate the connection string, and confirm firewall rules for the DB port.

title: Database queries are extremely slow
summary: Review the query plan, rebuild stale indexes, and update table statistics; check for blocking sessions.

title: Frequent database deadlocks under load
summary: Identify the conflicting transactions, align access order, and add retry-with-backoff on the application side.

title: Reporting a suspected phishing email
summary: Do not click links; report via the Phish button, quarantine the message, and check for other recipients.

title: Suspicious sign-in alert on your account
summary: Force a password reset, revoke active sessions, and confirm whether the location/device is recognized.

title: Lost or stolen device — remote wipe
summary: Mark the device lost in MDM, trigger a remote wipe, and rotate the user's credentials and tokens.

title: OneDrive / cloud files not syncing
summary: Reset the sync client, confirm available cloud storage, and re-link the account; check for path-length errors.

title: Access denied to a cloud application
summary: Verify the user's cloud role assignment and re-provision the SaaS entitlement via the access catalog.

title: VoIP softphone has no audio on calls
summary: Select the correct audio device in the softphone, check the SIP registration, and verify QoS on the network.
